name: Galileo
description: Galileo — ML data observability platform for finding and fixing bad training data in NLP and computer vision pipelines.

seo.title: Galileo — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Galileo: Galileo — ML data observability platform for finding and fixing bad training data in NLP and computer vision pipelines.

when_to_use: Monitoring LLM output quality and hallucinations in production
Running automated evals for RAG retrieval quality and grounding
Detecting prompt injection or policy violations at inference time
Debugging LLM application failures with trace-level visibility

pros: Finds mislabeled and noisy training data fast
Works across NLP, CV and LLM pipelines
Evaluation suite useful for RAG and agents
cons: Setup requires SDK instrumentation in pipelines
Overlaps with in-house tooling at larger labs
review.verdict: Worth it if bad data is actively blocking your model quality; overkill for small projects.
review.best_for: ML teams shipping NLP, CV or LLM models where data quality drives metrics
review.not_for: Early-stage prototypes or teams without a formal MLOps pipeline yet

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium tier; no explicit peak-lock or reserved-capacity evidence.
